title: No Night Skip
description: Prevents the night from skipping while regenerating health during sleep.
body:
# No Night Skip **Sleep Realism & Progressive Regeneration** [![NeoForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/NeoForge-1.21+-orange?style=for-the-badge)](https://neoforged.net/) [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-Source-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/Dreyka-Oas/NoNightSkip) [![MCreaHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/Project_Setup-MCreaHub-blue?style=for-the-badge)](https://mcreahub.pages.dev/) [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-green?style=for-the-badge)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT) **No Night Skip** changes the sleep mechanic. Instead of skipping the night instantly, players remain in bed while time progresses normally. Players slowly regenerate health to be fully healed exactly at dawn. [Report a Bug](https://github.com/Dreyka-Oas/NoNightSkip/issues)
--- ## 🌙 Features ### No Skip Mechanic The mod alters the fundamental behavior of sleep on the server. Even if all players are in bed, the night will not skip instantly. * **Immersion**: The night passes second by second. * **Safe Resting**: Players remain safe in their beds to set their spawn point or go AFK without forcing the time change. ### Progressive Healing While sleeping is no longer instant, it becomes a strategic way to recover. * **Dynamic Calculation**: The mod analyzes your missing health and the time remaining until sunrise. * **Perfect Timing**: You regenerate health smoothly to reach **100% HP** exactly when the sun rises (Tick 24000). * **Compatibility**: Whether the night is standard length or altered by other mods, the healing rate adapts automatically.
## ⚠️ Server Info **This mod is strictly Server-Side.** * **Admins**: Install this on your server to activate the mechanics. * **Players**: Clients **do not** need to install this mod to join.
